description: Identify remote land areas by subtracting urban zones from countries. Using the 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer and the 'ne_110m_populated_places' layer (located at /home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/), create a 2.0 degree buffer around the populated places and subtract this area from the countries layer. Export the resulting polygon shapefile, representing countries with holes around major cities, to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/remote_areas.shp.
